blocks.label: Flat Steel Sheets
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall supply single-skin flat steel sheets for visible application:

Width: {{sheetWidth}} mm
Steel thickness: min {{steelThickness}} mm
Substrate: {{substrate}}
Coating: {{coating}}, min {{coatingThickness}} µm
Colour: {{colour}}
Application: {{application}}
Area: {{area}} m²
Max length: {{maxLength}} m

Flatness tolerance: max {{flatnessTol}} mm/m (longitudinal), max {{flatnessTolT}} mm/m (transverse).

The Supplier shall confirm: flatness tolerances per EN 10143, suitability for visible application without additional finishing, substrate and coating specification, max sheet dimensions, weight per m².

STM reserves the right to reject non-compliant alternatives.

variables.label: Coating
variables.delegateText: Propose coating system suitable for visible application with min 25-year warranty.

variables.label: Colour
variables.delegateText: Colour chart to be provided. STM confirms.

blocks.label: Flashings & Accessories
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall supply matching flashings, corner pieces, and fixing accessories for flat sheet application:

Flashing material: {{flashMaterial}}
Colour: {{flashColour}}
Thickness: {{flashThk}} mm

Includes: corner pieces, edge trims, base flashings, fixing clips, rivets, sealant tape.

All accessories shall match the main flat sheet substrate and coating specification.

Confirm: compatibility with sheet system, corrosion resistance, availability of full accessory set.

variables.label: Flashing colour
variables.delegateText: Match to main flat sheet colour. STM confirms.

blocks.label: Standards
blocks.text:
EN 14782, EN 10143, EN 10169, EN 10346.
Coating warranty: min 25 years.
Attach: DoP, material certs, flatness test data, coating warranty.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
- Per m² flat sheet
- Per m1 flashings
- Per load transport

- Packaging surcharge
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Installation
- Substructure
- Joint sealants
- Crane
- Scaffolding
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule
2. Data sheets
3. DoP + CE
4. Flatness test data
5. Coating warranty
6. Colour samples
7. Lead time
8. General terms
9. Deviations
